courses.title: CS 447/647 / ECE 453: Software Testing, Quality Assurance, and Maintenance
courses.description: Introduces students to systematic software testing methodologies, automated quality assurance tools, and software maintenance frameworks for large-scale systems.

courses.title: SE 465: Software Testing and Quality Assurance
courses.description: Covers fundamental concepts of software testing, including test case design, unit testing, structural coverage, automation tools, and static analysis.

courses.title: SE 464: Software Design and Architectures
courses.description: Explores software architecture paradigms, design patterns, UML modeling, refactoring strategies, and component-level software design principles.

courses.title: ECE 750: Mining Large Software Data
courses.description: Advanced seminar investigating modern techniques for extracting, preparing, and modeling data from large software repositories, execution logs, and system metrics.

courses.title: SOEN 691: Mining Large Software System Data for DevOps
courses.meta: Graduate Course | Winter 2016, Fall 2017, Winter 2019, Winter 2020
courses.description: Covers state-of-the-art mining techniques applied to logs, telemetry, and source code repositories to support software maintenance and DevOps workflows.

courses.title: SOEN 345: Software Testing and Quality Assurance
courses.description: Focuses on software quality control processes, testing methodologies, test automation, and validation standards.

courses.title: SOEN 390: Software Engineering Team Project
courses.description: A project-based course where student teams design, develop, and deploy a large-scale software system, practicing modern software lifecycle standards.

courses.title: SOEN 341: Software Process
courses.description: Introduces software process models, agile practices, project management tools, requirements elicitation, and version control principles.

courses.title: CISC 880: Engineering Ultra-large-scale Systems
courses.description: Explores architectural styles, operational challenges, logging architectures, and performance engineering practices for ultra-large-scale software deployments.
